description: A naval operator must assess an unidentified subsurface contact detected by sonar to determine if it is a hostile submarine.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the acoustic signature of the subsurface contact.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator correctly analyzes the sonar data.

nodes.task_description: Compare the signature against a database of known friendly, neutral, and hostile submarine classes.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator finds a potential match with a known adversary submarine class.

nodes.task_description: Recommend deploying a maritime patrol aircraft to gain secondary confirmation of the contact.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator makes a timely and appropriate recommendation for further action.
